推荐场景: 地铁站广播区｜听懂公共广播主旨
60秒任务: 「公共广播」：公告主旨/影响判断；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 公告｜通知｜原因｜时间地点｜简短说明｜主旨理解
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Attention, please.（广播开头）
This is an announcement for ___.（说明对象）
The service will start at ___.（说明开始时间）
Because of ___, there will be a short delay.（说明原因）
Please stay in the waiting area.（说明行动）
Passengers should use exit ___.（给出指示）
The information on the screen has been updated.（说明更新）
If you need help, speak to a staff member.（提供帮助渠道）
Please listen for the next announcement.（提醒继续关注）
The main point is ___.（抓主旨）
So the next step is to ___.（总结行动）
I think they said ___.（复述关键信息）
Did they mention the reason?（确认原因）
Let’s check the screen again.（核对信息）
We should move now.（执行行动）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: announcement, service, delay, waiting area, exit, screen, staff member
Verbs: announce, start, delay, update, listen, mention
Adjectives / Adverbs: short, updated, clear, crowded
Time / Place: now, at three, exit two, waiting area
Chunks: attention please, short delay, use exit two, main point, next step
